impacts.statement: This flood will exceed the highest stage on record.
The levee along the left bank is overtopped.
Some low places along the left bank begin to flood.

properties.caption: St. Francis River Downstream of Fisk Gage
St. Francis River Upstream of Fisk Gage

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
